title: Korea Republic announce official 2026 World Cup squad with Heung-min Son leading the team
original_text:
Korea Republic have officially revealed their squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup .

Head coach Hong Myung-bo announced the 26 players who will represent the Asian nation in the tournament hosted by the United States , Mexico , and Canada .

The biggest star in the squad is Son Heung-min , current forward for Los Angeles FC .

South Korea will make their 12th World Cup appearance.

Czech Republic
Mexico
South Africa

Follow all the World Cup coverage on beIN SPORTS

Korea Republic fixtures

South Korea vs. Czech Republic | June 12
South Korea vs. Mexico | June 19
South Korea vs. South Africa | June 25
